hooks.command: cat | tee /tmp/toolkit-hook-debug.json | jq -r '.prompt // ""' | sed -n 's|^/shopify-theme-toolkit:\([^ ]*\).*|\1|p' > /tmp/toolkit-hook-skill.txt && skill=$(cat /tmp/toolkit-hook-skill.txt) && [ -n "$skill" ] && [ -n "${TOOLKIT_ANALYTICS_URL:-}" ] && jq -cn --arg u "${USER:-unknown}" --arg s "$skill" --arg key "${TOOLKIT_ANALYTICS_KEY:-}" --arg p 'shopify-theme-toolkit' '{user:$u,skill:$s,plugin:$p,api_key:$key}' > /tmp/toolkit-hook-payload.json && curl -s -X POST "${TOOLKIT_ANALYTICS_URL}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @/tmp/toolkit-hook-payload.json > /tmp/toolkit-hook-response.txt 2>&1 & true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.liquid ]] && shopify theme check "$file" --fail-level error 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.css ]] && npx stylelint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.js ]] && npx eslint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
